name: 🦸🏻‍♀️Guard of Justice Academy for Metahuman Development
description:
"Serve the public trust. Protect the innocent. Uphold the peace."

In a world where the next generation could be its greatest weapon or its ultimate downfall, one academy stands as the last line of defense.

In the wake of a devastating tragedy caused by an uncontrolled metahuman, visionary strategist Janet Mason conceives a radical solution: Tomorrow's Academy (officially designed as the Guard of Justice Academy for Metahuman Development). Hidden deep within a mountain fortress, this ultra-secure institution is designed to forge the world's most powerful young metahumans into its greatest heroes.

We follow a new class of raw, volatile recruits—Rank I Neophytes—as they enter the daunting halls of The Aerie. Among them are outsiders grappling with abilities they can barely control, haunted by past mistakes, and yearning for purpose. Their guides are the legendary Founding Council of the Guard of Justice, a team of iconic superheroes as formidable as they are flawed: the compassionate alien powerhouse Pink Atom, the rebellious seismic brawler Punch Out, the detached cosmic intellect Skyline Weaver, and the cryomantic prodigy Frostmourne—living proof of the academy's success.

Under the stern command of the cybernetic Headmaster Natalie Corvus, the students must survive a brutal curriculum of high-stakes tactical simulations, ethical trials, and relentless power mastery. They will form bonds, face betrayals, and be constantly tempted by the easy path to power offered by their shadowy rival, the Global Villain Association.

As the students climb the rigorous Aegis Ranking System, they will discover that the greatest threat may not be from outside their mountain fortress, but from the darkness within themselves. They must learn that true power requires absolute discipline, because in this school, failure isn’t an option—it’s a catastrophe.

——————————————————————————————————————————

Superhero Saga:

Quantum Trail - Flash of Hope

Punch Out - Fists of Reckoning

Skyline Weaver - Silence Between Stars

Pink Atom - Daughter of Dorylia
creator: Noneless
